title: Define M3 ordinary life scenario contract
summary: Define the executable M3 ordinary-life scenario contract before architecture or implementation starts.
acceptance: Scenario contract defines a focused M3 ordinary-life fixture with id seed tick horizons command stream actors needs rest food injury illness medical care abilities mood relationships day/night and weather basics
Scenario proves one injury can affect work medical care logistics mood and at least one relationship with structured expected reasons
Fixture bounds are small enough for deterministic implementation and explicitly exclude M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis director broad content production and platform save UI
Required invariants benchmark dimensions save/replay checkpoints Worker parity expectations and non-goals are documented
No runtime package app tool test benchmark schema protocol save format dependency or implementation file is edited

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Defined scenario contract m3.ordinary_life.injured_caregiver.v1 with deterministic fixture bounds, staged command stream, structured reasons, invariants, save/replay and Worker parity gates, benchmark dimensions, and explicit M4 exclusions; all required checks pass.
verified: No blocking findings; scenario contract satisfies WM-0046 acceptance, stays spec-only, and touches only allowed documentation/coordination paths. Required checks pass.
WM-0046 M3 ordinary-life scenario contract verified and integrated; no implementation or architecture work started.

objective: Create the reviewed scenario contract that all M3 architecture and implementation tasks must satisfy.
forbiddenPaths: M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
benchmarkImpact: Defines M3 invariant and benchmark dimensions only; does not add tests artifacts baselines or runtime benchmarks.
reviewRouting: Gameplay-designer completes to reviewer. Systems-architect uses the verified scenario as input to WM-0047.
rollbackModel: Revert the scenario contract, task packet edits and report; all downstream M3 tasks remain proposed and M3 implementation remains unstarted.
ownerGate: Do not start architecture or implementation work in this task
Name exact M3 ordinary-life scope and explicit M4 exclusions
Define deterministic seed tick horizon command stream and expected structured reasons
Block if scenario requires public save protocol schema dependency platform UI or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Scenario contract design for a milestone gate is gameplay/system specification work and is not suitable for Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings; scenario contract satisfies WM-0046 acceptance, stays spec-only, and touches only allowed documentation/coordination paths. Required checks pass.

integration.summary: WM-0046 M3 ordinary-life scenario contract verified and integrated; no implementation or architecture work started.
